title: Low-Level Optimization & Performance Engineering
description: This module teaches the discipline of rigorous performance engineering for rendering systems: CPU threading optimization, GPU profiling methodology, and the specific optimization techniques (SIMD, async compute, VRS) that separate a good renderer from a great one. Performance engineering is not the same as micro-optimization — it is a systematic methodology for identifying and eliminating bottlenecks at every level of the rendering stack. Prerequisites: All previous modules.
